paragraphs.chinese: 你好！我叫小明。我是中国人。我是学生。
paragraphs.pinyin: Nǐ hǎo! Wǒ jiào Xiǎomíng. Wǒ shì Zhōngguó rén. Wǒ shì xuéshēng.
paragraphs.english: Hello! My name is Xiaoming. I am Chinese. I am a student.

paragraphs.chinese: 我喜欢看书。我也喜欢喝茶。
paragraphs.pinyin: Wǒ xǐhuān kàn shū. Wǒ yě xǐhuān hē chá.
paragraphs.english: I like reading books. I also like drinking tea.

paragraphs.chinese: 我家有四个人。爸爸、妈妈、我和妹妹。
paragraphs.pinyin: Wǒ jiā yǒu sì ge rén. Bàba, māma, wǒ hé mèimei.
paragraphs.english: There are four people in my family. Dad, mom, me, and my younger sister.

paragraphs.chinese: 爸爸是老师。妈妈是医生。我们都很好。
paragraphs.pinyin: Bàba shì lǎoshī. Māma shì yīshēng. Wǒmen dōu hěn hǎo.
paragraphs.english: Dad is a teacher. Mom is a doctor. We are all doing well.

paragraphs.chinese: 今天是星期一。明天是星期二。
paragraphs.pinyin: Jīntiān shì xīngqī yī. Míngtiān shì xīngqī èr.
paragraphs.english: Today is Monday. Tomorrow is Tuesday.

paragraphs.chinese: 我今天上午有课。下午没有课。我想去商店买东西。
paragraphs.pinyin: Wǒ jīntiān shàngwǔ yǒu kè. Xiàwǔ méiyǒu kè. Wǒ xiǎng qù shāngdiàn mǎi dōngxi.
paragraphs.english: I have class this morning. I don't have class this afternoon. I want to go to the store to buy things.

paragraphs.chinese: 今天天气很好。不冷也不热。
paragraphs.pinyin: Jīntiān tiānqì hěn hǎo. Bù lěng yě bú rè.
paragraphs.english: The weather is very nice today. It's not cold and not hot.

paragraphs.chinese: 昨天下雨了。明天也会下雨。我不喜欢下雨天。
paragraphs.pinyin: Zuótiān xià yǔ le. Míngtiān yě huì xià yǔ. Wǒ bù xǐhuān xià yǔ tiān.
paragraphs.english: It rained yesterday. It will also rain tomorrow. I don't like rainy days.

paragraphs.chinese: 你想喝什么？我想喝茶。
paragraphs.pinyin: Nǐ xiǎng hē shénme? Wǒ xiǎng hē chá.
paragraphs.english: What would you like to drink? I'd like to drink tea.

paragraphs.chinese: 你喜欢喝热的还是冷的？我喜欢喝热茶。谢谢你！
paragraphs.pinyin: Nǐ xǐhuān hē rè de háishi lěng de? Wǒ xǐhuān hē rè chá. Xièxie nǐ!
paragraphs.english: Do you like to drink it hot or cold? I like to drink hot tea. Thank you!

paragraphs.chinese: 我在学校学习中文。我的老师姓王。
paragraphs.pinyin: Wǒ zài xuéxiào xuéxí Zhōngwén. Wǒ de lǎoshī xìng Wáng.
paragraphs.english: I study Chinese at school. My teacher's last name is Wang.

paragraphs.chinese: 我们班有十五个学生。大家都很喜欢学中文。
paragraphs.pinyin: Wǒmen bān yǒu shíwǔ ge xuéshēng. Dàjiā dōu hěn xǐhuān xué Zhōngwén.
paragraphs.english: There are fifteen students in our class. Everyone likes studying Chinese.

paragraphs.chinese: 喂？你好！我是小明。请问，你妈妈在家吗？
paragraphs.pinyin: Wèi? Nǐ hǎo! Wǒ shì Xiǎomíng. Qǐngwèn, nǐ māma zài jiā ma?
paragraphs.english: Hello? Hi! I'm Xiaoming. May I ask, is your mom at home?

paragraphs.chinese: 她不在。你可以打她的手机。号码是一三九八七六五四三二一。
paragraphs.pinyin: Tā bú zài. Nǐ kěyǐ dǎ tā de shǒujī. Hàomǎ shì yī sān jiǔ bā qī liù wǔ sì sān èr yī.
paragraphs.english: She's not here. You can call her cell phone. The number is 13987654321.

paragraphs.chinese: 我很喜欢吃水果。苹果、香蕉，我都喜欢。
paragraphs.pinyin: Wǒ hěn xǐhuān chī shuǐguǒ. Píngguǒ, xiāngjiāo, wǒ dōu xǐhuān.
paragraphs.english: I really like eating fruit. Apples, bananas, I like them all.

paragraphs.chinese: 你喜欢吃什么水果？我们一起去买吧！
paragraphs.pinyin: Nǐ xǐhuān chī shénme shuǐguǒ? Wǒmen yìqǐ qù mǎi ba!
paragraphs.english: What fruit do you like to eat? Let's go buy some together!

paragraphs.chinese: 我今年二十岁。我的生日是六月十五号。
paragraphs.pinyin: Wǒ jīnnián èrshí suì. Wǒ de shēngrì shì liù yuè shíwǔ hào.
paragraphs.english: I'm twenty years old this year. My birthday is June 15th.

paragraphs.chinese: 我的朋友小李今年也二十岁。他的生日是下个月。
paragraphs.pinyin: Wǒ de péngyǒu Xiǎo Lǐ jīnnián yě èrshí suì. Tā de shēngrì shì xià ge yuè.
paragraphs.english: My friend Xiao Li is also twenty this year. His birthday is next month.

paragraphs.chinese: 我想去商店买一些东西。我要买一本书和一个杯子。
paragraphs.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng qù shāngdiàn mǎi yìxiē dōngxi. Wǒ yào mǎi yì běn shū hé yí ge bēizi.
paragraphs.english: I want to go to the store to buy some things. I need to buy a book and a cup.

paragraphs.chinese: 这本书多少钱？十块钱。好的，我买了。
paragraphs.pinyin: Zhè běn shū duōshao qián? Shí kuài qián. Hǎo de, wǒ mǎi le.
paragraphs.english: How much is this book? Ten yuan. Okay, I'll buy it.

paragraphs.chinese: 我们去饭馆吃饭吧。你想吃什么？
paragraphs.pinyin: Wǒmen qù fànguǎn chī fàn ba. Nǐ xiǎng chī shénme?
paragraphs.english: Let's go to a restaurant to eat. What do you want to eat?

paragraphs.chinese: 我想吃米饭和菜。你呢？我想喝一杯水。
paragraphs.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng chī mǐfàn hé cài. Nǐ ne? Wǒ xiǎng hē yì bēi shuǐ.
paragraphs.english: I want to eat rice and vegetables. How about you? I want to drink a glass of water.

paragraphs.chinese: 现在几点？现在上午九点。我要去上课了。
paragraphs.pinyin: Xiànzài jǐ diǎn? Xiànzài shàngwǔ jiǔ diǎn. Wǒ yào qù shàng kè le.
paragraphs.english: What time is it now? It's 9 AM now. I need to go to class.

paragraphs.chinese: 下午三点我们一起去打球，好吗？好的！
paragraphs.pinyin: Xiàwǔ sān diǎn wǒmen yìqǐ qù dǎ qiú, hǎo ma? Hǎo de!
paragraphs.english: At 3 PM let's go play ball together, okay? Sure!

paragraphs.chinese: 你住在哪儿？我住在北京。我家在学校前面。
paragraphs.pinyin: Nǐ zhù zài nǎr? Wǒ zhù zài Běijīng. Wǒ jiā zài xuéxiào qiánmiàn.
paragraphs.english: Where do you live? I live in Beijing. My home is in front of the school.

paragraphs.chinese: 你的家大吗？不大，但是很好。
paragraphs.pinyin: Nǐ de jiā dà ma? Bú dà, dànshì hěn hǎo.
paragraphs.english: Is your home big? Not big, but very nice.

paragraphs.chinese: 我很喜欢中国菜。中国菜很好吃。
paragraphs.pinyin: Wǒ hěn xǐhuān Zhōngguó cài. Zhōngguó cài hěn hǎochī.
paragraphs.english: I really like Chinese food. Chinese food is very delicious.

paragraphs.chinese: 我会做一些中国菜。我的朋友们都喜欢吃我做的菜。
paragraphs.pinyin: Wǒ huì zuò yìxiē Zhōngguó cài. Wǒ de péngyǒumen dōu xǐhuān chī wǒ zuò de cài.
paragraphs.english: I can cook some Chinese dishes. My friends all like eating the food I make.

paragraphs.chinese: 小明是一个学生。他今年十八岁。他住在北京。
paragraphs.pinyin: Xiǎomíng shì yí ge xuéshēng. Tā jīnnián shíbā suì. Tā zhù zài Běijīng.
paragraphs.english: Xiaoming is a student. He is eighteen years old this year. He lives in Beijing.

paragraphs.chinese: 今天是星期一。小明早上七点起床。他吃了早饭，然后去学校。
paragraphs.pinyin: Jīntiān shì xīngqī yī. Xiǎomíng zǎoshang qī diǎn qǐchuáng. Tā chī le zǎofàn, ránhòu qù xuéxiào.
paragraphs.english: Today is Monday. Xiaoming gets up at 7 in the morning. He eats breakfast, then goes to school.

paragraphs.chinese: 上午他有中文课和数学课。他很喜欢中文课。他的中文老师很好。
paragraphs.pinyin: Shàngwǔ tā yǒu Zhōngwén kè hé shùxué kè. Tā hěn xǐhuān Zhōngwén kè. Tā de Zhōngwén lǎoshī hěn hǎo.
paragraphs.english: In the morning he has Chinese class and math class. He really likes Chinese class. His Chinese teacher is very good.

paragraphs.chinese: 中午他和朋友一起吃饭。下午他没有课。他去图书馆看书。
paragraphs.pinyin: Zhōngwǔ tā hé péngyǒu yìqǐ chī fàn. Xiàwǔ tā méiyǒu kè. Tā qù túshūguǎn kàn shū.
paragraphs.english: At noon he eats with friends. In the afternoon he has no class. He goes to the library to read.

paragraphs.chinese: 晚上他回家。他做作业，然后看电视。十点他睡觉了。
paragraphs.pinyin: Wǎnshang tā huí jiā. Tā zuò zuòyè, ránhòu kàn diànshì. Shí diǎn tā shuìjiào le.
paragraphs.english: In the evening he goes home. He does homework, then watches TV. At 10 o'clock he goes to sleep.

paragraphs.chinese: 我叫小红。今天是我在新学校的第一天。
paragraphs.pinyin: Wǒ jiào Xiǎohóng. Jīntiān shì wǒ zài xīn xuéxiào de dì yī tiān.
paragraphs.english: My name is Xiaohong. Today is my first day at the new school.

paragraphs.chinese: 我有一点儿紧张。我不认识这里的人。
paragraphs.pinyin: Wǒ yǒu yìdiǎnr jǐnzhāng. Wǒ bú rènshi zhèlǐ de rén.
paragraphs.english: I'm a little nervous. I don't know anyone here.

paragraphs.chinese: 上课的时候，一个女孩对我说：「你好！你叫什么名字？」
paragraphs.pinyin: Shàng kè de shíhou, yí ge nǚhái duì wǒ shuō: "Nǐ hǎo! Nǐ jiào shénme míngzi?"
paragraphs.english: During class, a girl said to me: "Hello! What's your name?"

paragraphs.chinese: 我说：「我叫小红。」她说：「我叫小丽。我们做朋友吧！」
paragraphs.pinyin: Wǒ shuō: "Wǒ jiào Xiǎohóng." Tā shuō: "Wǒ jiào Xiǎolì. Wǒmen zuò péngyǒu ba!"
paragraphs.english: I said: "My name is Xiaohong." She said: "I'm Xiaoli. Let's be friends!"

paragraphs.chinese: 下课以后，小丽带我去吃饭。我们吃了米饭和菜。我们说了很多话。
paragraphs.pinyin: Xià kè yǐhòu, Xiǎolì dài wǒ qù chī fàn. Wǒmen chī le mǐfàn hé cài. Wǒmen shuō le hěn duō huà.
paragraphs.english: After class, Xiaoli took me to eat. We ate rice and vegetables. We talked a lot.

paragraphs.chinese: 回家的时候，我很高兴。我有了一个新朋友！
paragraphs.pinyin: Huí jiā de shíhou, wǒ hěn gāoxìng. Wǒ yǒu le yí ge xīn péngyǒu!
paragraphs.english: When I went home, I was very happy. I made a new friend!

paragraphs.chinese: 小明家有一只小猫。小猫叫花花。花花很可爱。
paragraphs.pinyin: Xiǎomíng jiā yǒu yì zhī xiǎo māo. Xiǎo māo jiào Huāhua. Huāhua hěn kě'ài.
paragraphs.english: Xiaoming's family has a little cat. The cat is called Huahua. Huahua is very cute.

paragraphs.chinese: 一天，小明回家。他看不到花花了。花花不在家！
paragraphs.pinyin: Yì tiān, Xiǎomíng huí jiā. Tā kàn bú dào Huāhua le. Huāhua bú zài jiā!
paragraphs.english: One day, Xiaoming came home. He couldn't see Huahua. Huahua was not at home!

paragraphs.chinese: 小明很着急。他去外面找花花。他问他的朋友：「你看到我的猫了吗？」
paragraphs.pinyin: Xiǎomíng hěn zháojí. Tā qù wàimiàn zhǎo Huāhua. Tā wèn tā de péngyǒu: "Nǐ kàn dào wǒ de māo le ma?"
paragraphs.english: Xiaoming was very anxious. He went outside to look for Huahua. He asked his friends: "Have you seen my cat?"

paragraphs.chinese: 朋友说：「我没有看到。」小明到处找，但是找不到。
paragraphs.pinyin: Péngyǒu shuō: "Wǒ méiyǒu kàn dào." Xiǎomíng dàochù zhǎo, dànshì zhǎo bú dào.
paragraphs.english: The friend said: "I haven't seen it." Xiaoming looked everywhere, but couldn't find it.

paragraphs.chinese: 天快黑了，小明回家了。他很不高兴。
paragraphs.pinyin: Tiān kuài hēi le, Xiǎomíng huí jiā le. Tā hěn bù gāoxìng.
paragraphs.english: It was getting dark, and Xiaoming went home. He was very unhappy.

paragraphs.chinese: 他开门的时候，花花在门后面！花花一直在家里！小明太高兴了！
paragraphs.pinyin: Tā kāi mén de shíhou, Huāhua zài mén hòumiàn! Huāhua yìzhí zài jiā lǐ! Xiǎomíng tài gāoxìng le!
paragraphs.english: When he opened the door, Huahua was behind the door! Huahua had been at home all along! Xiaoming was so happy!

paragraphs.chinese: 明天是小丽的生日。她今年二十岁了。
paragraphs.pinyin: Míngtiān shì Xiǎolì de shēngrì. Tā jīnnián èrshí suì le.
paragraphs.english: Tomorrow is Xiaoli's birthday. She is turning twenty this year.

paragraphs.chinese: 小丽请了很多朋友来她家。她的爸爸妈妈买了一个大蛋糕。
paragraphs.pinyin: Xiǎolì qǐng le hěn duō péngyǒu lái tā jiā. Tā de bàba māma mǎi le yí ge dà dàngāo.
paragraphs.english: Xiaoli invited many friends to her home. Her parents bought a big cake.

paragraphs.chinese: 朋友们都来了。大家给小丽唱生日歌。小丽很高兴。
paragraphs.pinyin: Péngyǒumen dōu lái le. Dàjiā gěi Xiǎolì chàng shēngrì gē. Xiǎolì hěn gāoxìng.
paragraphs.english: All the friends came. Everyone sang the birthday song for Xiaoli. Xiaoli was very happy.

paragraphs.chinese: 他们吃蛋糕，喝饮料，说了很多话。大家都很开心。
paragraphs.pinyin: Tāmen chī dàngāo, hē yǐnliào, shuō le hěn duō huà. Dàjiā dōu hěn kāixīn.
paragraphs.english: They ate cake, drank beverages, and talked a lot. Everyone was very happy.

paragraphs.chinese: 小明送给小丽一本书。小丽说：「谢谢你！这是我最喜欢的礼物！」
paragraphs.pinyin: Xiǎomíng sòng gěi Xiǎolì yì běn shū. Xiǎolì shuō: "Xièxie nǐ! Zhè shì wǒ zuì xǐhuān de lǐwù!"
paragraphs.english: Xiaoming gave Xiaoli a book. Xiaoli said: "Thank you! This is my favorite gift!"

paragraphs.chinese: 晚上十点，大家回家了。小丽说这是她最好的生日。
paragraphs.pinyin: Wǎnshang shí diǎn, dàjiā huí jiā le. Xiǎolì shuō zhè shì tā zuì hǎo de shēngrì.
paragraphs.english: At 10 PM, everyone went home. Xiaoli said this was her best birthday.
